description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named BuildDev that runs on push to all branches except master and paths under src/. Configure two jobs, build_linux and build_windows. The build_linux job runs on ubuntu-16.04, checks out code, generates version info, configures CMake, builds, tests, and uploads a Linux library artifact. The build_windows job depends on build_linux, runs on windows-latest, checks out code, generates version info, tests, downloads the Linux library artifact, builds, and creates a draft GitHub release.
